description: Add Chapter 4 (Modifikasi Polimer dan Material Maju Polimer) covering polymer coating, desalination membranes, batteries/supercapacitors, conductive polymers, and smart polymers. Also add Chapter 5 (Penutup) and the Back Matter (Daftar Pustaka and Lampiran 1-6).
steps: Write Section 4.1 Polimer sebagai Bahan Pelapis (Polymer Coatings): types of coatings (epoxy, polyurethane, acrylic), coating mechanisms, surface modification techniques, industrial applications (corrosion protection, automotive, food packaging)

Write Section 4.2 Membran Polimer untuk Desalinasi (Polymer Membranes for Desalination): reverse osmosis membranes, thin-film composite membranes, membrane materials (polyamide, cellulose acetate), performance parameters (flux, rejection rate, fouling)

Write Section 4.3 Polimer dalam Baterai dan Superkapasitor (Polymers in Batteries and Supercapacitors): polymer electrolytes (PEO-based, gel polymers), separator membranes, polymer binders, conducting polymer electrodes, energy storage mechanisms

Write Section 4.4 Polimer Konduktif (Conductive Polymers): polyacetylene, polyaniline, polypyrrole, PEDOT:PSS - doping mechanisms, band theory applied to conjugated polymers, applications in sensors/OLEDs/solar cells

Write Section 4.5 Polimer Pintar (Smart Polymers): stimuli-responsive polymers (temperature - LCST/UCST, pH-responsive, light-responsive), shape memory polymers, self-healing polymers, drug delivery applications
Write Section 4.6 Rangkuman, 4.7 Latihan Soal (10 questions), 4.8 Bahan Diskusi

Write Chapter 5 - Penutup: 5.1 Prospek Masa Depan Polimer (future prospects), 5.2 Tantangan dan Peluang (challenges and opportunities), 5.3 Arah Penelitian (research directions in biodegradable polymers, nanocomposites, biomedical polymers, green chemistry approaches)

Write Back Matter: Daftar Pustaka (bibliography with at least 30 realistic academic references), Lampiran 1 (Daftar Istilah/Glossary), Lampiran 2 (Tabel Sifat Polimer Umum), Lampiran 3 (Struktur Monomer Penting), Lampiran 4 (Simbol dan Singkatan), Lampiran 5 (Panduan Keselamatan Laboratorium Polimer), Lampiran 6 (Contoh Soal Ujian)
acceptance_criteria: Chapter 4 covers all 5 advanced polymer topics with scientific depth
Conductive polymers section includes doping mechanisms and band theory concepts
Smart polymers section covers stimuli-responsive behavior with examples
Chapter 5 provides a forward-looking conclusion with research directions
Bibliography contains at least 30 properly formatted references
All 6 appendices are present with useful reference content
verification: Read the end of the file and confirm Chapter 4, Chapter 5, bibliography, and all appendices are present
Confirm the document structure is complete (begins with \documentclass and ends with \end{document})
findings: Successfully added Chapter 4 (5 sections covering coatings, membranes, batteries, conductive polymers, smart polymers + rangkuman + 10 soal + 4 diskusi topics), Chapter 5 (3 sections on future prospects, challenges, research directions), and complete back matter (31 references, glossary with 42 terms, polymer properties table with 15 polymers, 18 monomer structures, 42 symbols/abbreviations, safety guide with 7 sections, sample exam with 5 essay + 10 short answer questions). Document is properly closed with \end{document}. All \begin/\end environments are balanced (89 each). Content entirely in Indonesian.
